topic: Wish / If Only (Expressing Regret and Desire)

exercises.audioScript: I wish I had more time.
exercises.hindiScript: मुझे काश मेरे पास ज़्यादा समय होता।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: If only the weather were good.
I wish I worked harder.
If only I had more money.
I wish I had more time.
exercises.answer: I wish I had more time.

exercises.audioScript: I wish you would listen to me.
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: I wish I had talked to him.
If only he had forgiven me.
I wish I were there.
I wish you would listen to me.
exercises.answer: I wish you would listen to me.

exercises.audioScript: I wish I had not taken this decision.
exercises.hindiScript: मुझे काश मैं यह decision न लेता।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: If only I had known this earlier.
I wish I knew this language.
If only I had studied earlier.
I wish I had not taken this decision.
exercises.answer: I wish I had not taken this decision.

exercises.audioScript: If only we could meet again.
exercises.hindiScript: काश हम फिर से मिल पाते।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: I wish I had more time.
I wish you would speak slowly.
I wish I had not made this mistake.
If only we could meet again.
exercises.answer: If only we could meet again.

exercises.hindiScript: मुझे काश मैं और मेहनत करता।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: I wish you would listen to me.
I wish I had taken that opportunity.
I wish you would calm down.
I wish I worked harder.

exercises.audioScript: If only he had forgiven me.
exercises.hindiScript: काश उसने मुझे माफ़ कर दिया होता।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: I wish I had not taken this decision.
If only we had not gone there.
I wish I could fly.
If only he had forgiven me.
exercises.answer: If only he had forgiven me.

exercises.audioScript: I wish I knew this language.
exercises.hindiScript: मुझे काश मैं यह भाषा जानता।
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: If only we could meet again.
I wish I had more money.
If only the weather were good.
I wish I knew this language.
exercises.answer: I wish I knew this language.

exercises.audioScript: I wish you would speak slowly.
exercises.question: What did you hear? Choose the correct sentence.
options: I wish I worked harder.
If only I had more money.
I wish I had talked to him.
I wish you would speak slowly.
exercises.answer: I wish you would speak slowly.

dictationPassage.text: I wish I had more time. I wish you would listen to me. I wish I had not taken this decision. If only we could meet again. I wish I worked harder.
dictationPassage.hindiTranslation: मुझे काश मेरे पास ज़्यादा समय होता। काश तुम मुझे सुनो। मुझे काश मैं यह decision न लेता। काश हम फिर से मिल पाते। मुझे काश मैं और मेहनत करता।
